channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: A person of interest is in custody after 2 U.S. Bank employees were killed in a Kentucky robbery
item.description: A Kentucky state trooper says a person of interest has been taken into custody in connection with the fatal shootings of two bank employees during a robbery.

item.title: Habitat for Humanity is developing a new Atlanta community with help from the Carters’ initiative
OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma’s settlement, by the numbers
